objects.query: SELECT Id, DeveloperName FROM BatchCalcJobDefinition ORDER BY DeveloperName
SELECT Name FROM Account ORDER BY Name
SELECT Name, Status, Frequency, StartDate, EndDate, ProgramReferenceNumber, RebateProgramUrl, PayoutCalculationDayCount, GracePeriodDayCount, CurrencyIsoCode FROM RebateProgram ORDER BY Name

SELECT Name, Status, StartDate, EndDate, RebateProgramId, PayoutCalculationDate, TransactionGracePeriodDate, CurrencyIsoCode, RebateProgram.Name FROM RebateProgramPayoutPeriod ORDER BY RebateProgram.Name, Name

SELECT Name, MemberStatus, AccountId, RebateProgramId, ShipToAccountId, IsPayoutCalcSkipped, CurrencyIsoCode, Account.Name, RebateProgram.Name FROM RebateProgramMember ORDER BY RebateProgram.Name, Account.Name

SELECT Name, Status, RebateProgramId, AggregateObjectName, BenefitQualifierField, AccrualRate, CalculationBasis, CalcObjectId, CalculationMethod, CalculationType, CurrencyIsoCode, FilterAction, FilterLogic, IsIntegratable, MeasureField, RebateMeasureType, UnitofMeasureId, RebateProgram.Name, CalcObject.DeveloperName FROM ProgramRebateType ORDER BY RebateProgram.Name, Name

SELECT Name, Status, ProgramRebateTypeId, ProductId, BenefitValue, EffectiveStartDate, EffectiveEndDate, MaximumMeasureFieldValue, MaximumQualifyingValue, MinimumQualifyingValue, CurrencyIsoCode, ProgramRebateType.Name FROM ProgramRebateTypeBenefit ORDER BY ProgramRebateType.Name, Name
